channel.title: Stablecoin on DePix Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Stablecoin on DePix Blog

item.title: What Is DePix? Brazil's Stablecoin on Liquid
item.description:
If you have been following cryptocurrency but wondered how digital money actually works in everyday life, DePix is a great place to start. This article explains what DePix is, how it connects Brazil’s instant payment system (PIX) to the Bitcoin ecosystem, and why it matters for anyone interested in stablecoins and the Liquid Network.

What is a stablecoin and why does it matter?

A stablecoin is a cryptocurrency pegged to a traditional currency. Unlike Bitcoin, which can swing 10% in a single day, a stablecoin maintains a stable value. DePix is pegged 1:1 to the Brazilian real (BRL), meaning each DePix token is always worth exactly one real.
